title: ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Pan Kit with Glass Vials Pocket Scale 7pc
description:
The ASR Outdoor compact gold prospecting bundle comes with 7 essential tools for identifying, collecting, and evaluating gold flakes and precious metals while panning for valuable materials - glass collection vials, a gold sifting pan, a pocket scale, and polyethylene pipette droppers. This gold panning kit comes with a 10” diameter green gold pan with dual riffles designed to sift through dirt and silt for gold nuggets and flakes. The deep green color will ensure your ability to locate and sift through silt and sand for valuable materials. The ASR Outdoor gold rush set features 3 glass collection vials with a capacity of 2 drams each (.125 oz). The large-sized vials are ideal for storing gems, gold flakes, and other precious metals located during gold prospecting

ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Pan Kit with Glass Vials Pocket Scale 7pc

The ASR Outdoor compact gold prospecting bundle comes with 7 essential tools for identifying, collecting, and evaluating gold flakes and precious metals while panning for valuable materials - glass collection vials, a gold sifting pan, a pocket scale, and polyethylene pipette droppers.

This gold panning kit comes with a 10” diameter green gold pan with dual riffles designed to sift through dirt and silt for gold nuggets and flakes. The deep green color will ensure your ability to locate and sift through silt and sand for valuable materials.

Key Features

  • ESSENTIAL GOLD PROSPECTING TOOLS - The ASR Outdoor gold panning kit comes with 7 essential tools for locating, collecting, and evaluating gems and minerals while panning for gold - a gold pan, glass collection vials, pipette droppers, and a pocket scale.
  • 10” DIAMETER GOLD PAN - The kit comes with a 10” diameter dual riffle green gold pan designed to sift through silt and dirt for gold flakes. The dark green color ensures you’ll be able to identify and separate precious metals from sand and dirt.
  • GLASS COLLECTION VIALS - The set features 3 collection vials with a 2-dram capacity (.125oz). The large glass vials are great for storing gold flakes, gems, and other valuable finds during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your findings safe during transit.
  • COMPACT POCKET SCALE - The digital pocket scale features high precision sensors that can measure in five different units including grams, ounces, tola, carat, and grains; its versatility is ideal for weighing precious metals, gems, coins, or stones. Measuring just 4.8 inches by 2.5 inches, the scale is lightweight and compact, making it easy to carry, pack or store in a jacket pocket when you’re gold panning in the field.
  • PIPETTE DROPPERS - Included are 2 3mL capacity industrial pipette droppers designed to easily draw and dispense gold, liquids, and particles. They measure 5.5” in length and come with easy-to-read graduation markers. They are made of non-toxic polyethylene.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROPGPS7PC
  • UPC: 060886400387
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 10 in

The ASR Outdoor gold rush set features 3 glass collection vials with a capacity of 2 drams each (.125 oz). The large-sized vials are ideal for storing gems, gold flakes, and other precious metals located during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your valuable findings stored during transit out of the field.

In addition, we’ve included a lightweight pocket scale ideal for weighing metals, gems, and gold flakes you locate while panning out in the field. It measures just 4.8” x 2.5” so it will easily fit inside any standard backpacks, bags, or pockets.

Lastly, we’ve added 2 non-toxic polyethylene industrial pipette droppers designed to easily draw and dispense liquids, gold, and other particles. They each have a capacity of 3mL and have a length of 5.5”.

Gold panning is a great outdoor activity for adults and children alike. This compact kit easily fits inside most standard backpacks and travel bags, making it a great bundle for camping and hiking adventures. Take this set with you next time you go out to prospect, and maybe you’ll strike it rich!
